home.h1: Manage rice irrigation services, inputs, and scheduling — in one place.
home.lead: IRIFAMS helps farmers, officers, and scheme administrators coordinate water usage, tractor services, inputs distribution, harvesting, payments, and reporting.

services.title: Services
services.desc: All core workflows in one system—from registration to payments and reporting.

items.title: Farmer Registration
items.desc: Register farmers, farms and plots for official access.

items.title: Irrigation Water
items.desc: Monitor water usage per plot and schedule rotations fairly.

items.title: Tractor Services
items.desc: Digital requests and scheduling for land preparation.

items.title: Inputs (Pembejeo)
items.desc: Requests and tracking distribution to reduce misuse.

items.title: Harvesting
items.desc: Request harvesting machinery and organize on time.

items.title: Payments & Reports
items.desc: Transparent records and reports for decisions.

how.title: How it works
how.desc: Simple steps to get services and stay informed.

steps.title: 1) Register
steps.desc: Create an account and submit farmer/farm details.

steps.title: 2) Request services
steps.desc: Ask for water schedule, tractor, inputs, or harvesting.

steps.title: 3) Get updates
steps.desc: Receive notifications about approvals, schedules and payments.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Reach scheme office for support and guidance.

footer.about: Transparent irrigation services, inputs, scheduling, and reporting for rice schemes.
